productDisplayName: Baggit Women Pink Border Sapera Wallet
description: Style Note An adorable pink colour wallet is a must have for your collection! baggit brings to you this classy and elegant wallet; it has multiple compartments to carry your cards and cash. Go, grab one for yourself! Carry it to social get-together with friends and look trendy.  Product Details Three fold pink wallet with a magnetic button flap closure  Top stitch detailing on the front First fold has one insert pocket One id card holder, five card holders and two insert pockets on the second fold One pocket with zip closure and an insert pocket in the centre Branding on the back and one zippered pocket Material and Care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dustSize Height: 9 cm  Width: 19 cm Depth: 1 cm
